steps.title: Support the overall trend
steps.content: The sentence contrasts 1980 with 2010. It first says none of the countries had more than 2 women on their high courts in 1980, so the blank should provide 2010 data showing an increase beyond that earlier ceiling.

steps.title: Complete the contrast
steps.content: Choice B compares which country's increase was largest, not the broad 1980-to-2010 contrast. Choice C discusses reductions in intermediate years, and Choice D mentions only Mexico. Choice A says Peru, the Philippines, and Mexico each had 3 women in 2010, which directly contrasts with the earlier maximum of 2. The answer is A.
